nl_query: Show all scripts where the legal hold was approved by the COE Office.
failed_sql:
SELECT sh.id, sh.case_id, sh.hold_reason, au_approved.display_name AS approved_by
FROM script_hold sh
JOIN app_user au_applied ON au_applied.id = sh.applied_by
JOIN app_user au_approved ON au_approved.id = sh.approved_by
WHERE sh.script_id = :script_id;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: syntax error at or near "LIMIT"
LINE 1: ...proved.id = sh.approved_by WHERE sh.script_id = ? LIMIT 1000
                                                             ^
